response:
The previous step confirmed the widget opens and sends a message. The next logical step is to verify the backend received it and returned a response. Since I cannot view the screenshot `/tmp/meno-chat-response.png` directly in this text-based interaction, I will check the backend logs to confirm the API call was successful and returned a valid response. This serves as the technical verification of the integration.

I will tail the logs of the running `uvicorn` process to see the request handling.

```bash
# Check if the uvicorn process is still running and get its PID
ps aux | grep "uvicorn chat_api:app" | grep -v grep
```
